rationale: Both reviews identify the identical core scope problems (IsUnipotent + ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup are premature Layer-5/6 shells using : True before Layers 0-5 exist and have no path to real defs), so following either drops exactly those, leaving the same foundation code; Review 2's extra bundling directive and Review 1's single-unit split are equivalent in effect and not decisive for the resulting merged PR.
